title: Tensura slime core crafting datapack
description: Craft Slime cores from slime chunks
body: Craft A slime core using 4 slime chunks surrounding a slime chunk block![A crafting table with a slime chunk block in the middle surrounded by four slime chunks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/391c656c9a1a4f8ba26416e761a335a09d797653.png)
